name: opencode-xai-oauth
description: OpenCode plugin that attaches OAuth/API-key authentication to OpenCode's built-in `xai` provider and adds xAI/Grok tools for text, web search, X search, TTS, image generation, and video generation.

scripts.build: bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target bun --format esm --external @opencode-ai/plugin && bun build ./src/cli.ts --outdir ./dist --target node --format esm
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run typecheck && bun run build

author: ilseoblee
